message:
feat(security): implement zone-wide revocation SLA with quorum-signed frontier [MOR/C1.4]

Add revocation_freshness_sla_secs to ZoneCheckpoint (default 300s).
Add RevocationSlaChecker with check_sla() and may_proceed() — Critical
operations MUST abort when SLA is breached, Risky/Safe may proceed.
Add RevocationSlaStatus enum (Fresh/Breached). 6 acceptance tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
